# Java 17 to 21 Migration

Check build tool support, CI images, and dependency compatibility before adopting language features.

## Gradle Toolchain

```kotlin
java {
    toolchain {
        languageVersion = JavaLanguageVersion.of(21)
    }
}
```

## Maven

```xml
<properties>
  <maven.compiler.release>21</maven.compiler.release>
</properties>
```

## CI and Container Image

```dockerfile
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre-alpine
```

Update GitHub Actions, Jenkins agents, and deployment manifests to match.

## Dependency Compatibility

Verify Spring Boot, Hibernate, bytecode tools, and annotation processors support Java 21 before enabling preview features.

## Virtual Threads (Optional, After Stable Baseline)

```java
@Bean
public TomcatProtocolHandlerCustomizer<?> virtualThreadExecutor() {
    return protocolHandler -> protocolHandler.setExecutor(Executors.newVirtualThreadPerTaskExecutor());
}
```

Adopt only after correctness and observability baselines pass on platform threads.

## Verification

```bash
./gradlew clean test
java -version   # expect 21.x in CI and runtime
```

Verify packaging, native image (if used), and runtime smoke tests on Java 21.
